mantra: I close the loop. I do not re-enter.
nexx_move: Say it once on exhale. Close one tab. Done.

mantra: Signal over noise. I choose the quiet path.
nexx_move: Mute one channel. Write one true line.

mantra: My body is the first firewall.
nexx_move: Water. Shoulders down. Feet on floor.

mantra: I am already fixed enough to rest.
nexx_move: Name three things handled. Stop auditing.

mantra: Clarity arrives at daylight, not at 3am.
nexx_move: Shelve the spiral. Sleep is data collection.

mantra: I move one packet. That is enough.
nexx_move: One email, one file, one brave click.

mantra: The raven flies; I do not chase it.
nexx_move: Let the obsessive thought pass. Watch it leave.

mantra: I encrypt my peace. No unauthorized access.
nexx_move: Say no once. Mean it. No apology subroutine.

mantra: Harvest what grew. Release what didn't.
nexx_move: Archive one failure. Keep one win visible.

mantra: I am the lantern, not the storm.
nexx_move: Solitude ten minutes. No inputs.

mantra: Trust the draw. I don't rig the deck.
nexx_move: Accept today's outcome. Act from here.

mantra: Warmth is evidence. I allow it.
nexx_move: Share one good thing out loud.

mantra: I starve the chain one day.
nexx_move: Identify what you feed the loop. Deny it today.

mantra: Neon fades. The core remains.
nexx_move: Strip one layer of performance. Be plain.

mantra: I pour water before I parse data.
nexx_move: Hydrate. Then decide. In that order.

mantra: Every ending is a port I can close.
nexx_move: End one session cleanly. Log out.

mantra: I speak the mantra; the field rearranges.
nexx_move: Repeat three times. Feel the shift.

mantra: Bandwidth is sacred. I guard mine.
nexx_move: Silence notifications one hour.

mantra: The tower fell. I build different.
nexx_move: Don't repeat the old bug. Patch new.

mantra: I am safe enough to stop proving it.
nexx_move: Put down the evidence folder. Breathe.

mantra: Root down. Rise slow.
nexx_move: Walk outside. No headphones.

mantra: My yes is clean. My no is clean.
nexx_move: One clear boundary before noon.

mantra: The moon fogs; daylight decodes.
nexx_move: Defer the verdict until morning.

mantra: I am the operator, not the panic.
nexx_move: Hands on keyboard. One task. Focus.
